creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: It looks like a bug in Additional element status diagnostic page.  You may see they use element indexes from 1 to 12, while with eiioe=0 it has to be 0 to 11.  It would have sense if eiiie=1, but it is not.  I don't know what they were thinking about.  I would recommend to ask HPE about the firmware update.  I don't see error from our side here, the only thing we could do is a workaround, that I hate to do.
